member.summary: Permission levels for API authorization.

member.summary: No authentication required.

member.returns: The restarted mission, or null on failure.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum
member.summary: Supported agent runtime types.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum.ClaudeCode
member.summary: Anthropic Claude Code CLI.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum.Codex
member.summary: OpenAI Codex CLI.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum.Gemini
member.summary: Google Gemini CLI.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum.Cursor
member.summary: Cursor agent CLI.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum.Custom
member.summary: Custom agent runtime.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.BranchCleanupPolicyEnum
member.summary: Policy for cleaning up mission branches after successful landing.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.BranchCleanupPolicyEnum.LocalOnly
member.summary: Delete the mission branch from the local bare repository only. Remote branches are left for the git host to manage (e.g. auto-delete on PR merge). This is the default behavior.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.BranchCleanupPolicyEnum.LocalAndRemote
member.summary: Delete the mission branch from both the local bare repository and the remote origin. Use this when the git host does not auto-delete merged branches.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.BranchCleanupPolicyEnum.None
member.summary: Do not delete mission branches after landing. Branches are retained for inspection. Useful for auditing or debugging — stale branches must be cleaned up manually.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.CaptainStateEnum
member.summary: State of a captain agent.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.CaptainStateEnum.Idle
member.summary: Captain is idle and available for assignment.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.CaptainStateEnum.Working
member.summary: Captain is actively working on a mission.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.CaptainStateEnum.Stalled
member.summary: Captain process appears stalled.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.CaptainStateEnum.Stopping
member.summary: Captain is in the process of stopping.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.DatabaseTypeEnum
member.summary: Supported database types.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DatabaseTypeEnum.Sqlite
member.summary: SQLite embedded database.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DatabaseTypeEnum.Postgresql
member.summary: PostgreSQL database.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DatabaseTypeEnum.SqlServer
member.summary: Microsoft SQL Server database.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DatabaseTypeEnum.Mysql
member.summary: MySQL database.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.DeleteMultipleStatusEnum
member.summary: Status of a batch delete operation.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DeleteMultipleStatusEnum.Deleted
member.summary: All requested entities were deleted successfully.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DeleteMultipleStatusEnum.PartiallyDeleted
member.summary: Some entities were deleted but others were skipped.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.DeleteMultipleStatusEnum.NoneDeleted
member.summary: No entities were deleted (all were skipped or not found).

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.EnumerationOrderEnum
member.summary: Sort order for enumeration results.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EnumerationOrderEnum.CreatedAscending
member.summary: Sort by created date ascending (oldest first).

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EnumerationOrderEnum.CreatedDescending
member.summary: Sort by created date descending (newest first).

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationActionEnum
member.summary: Actions to take when an escalation rule triggers.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationActionEnum.Log
member.summary: Log to the standard log file.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationActionEnum.Webhook
member.summary: Send an HTTP webhook POST.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationTriggerEnum
member.summary: Conditions that can trigger an escalation.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationTriggerEnum.CaptainStalled
member.summary: A captain has been stalled for longer than the threshold.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationTriggerEnum.MissionOverdue
member.summary: A mission has been in progress for longer than the threshold.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationTriggerEnum.MissionFailed
member.summary: A mission has failed.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationTriggerEnum.RecoveryExhausted
member.summary: Recovery attempts exhausted for a captain.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.EscalationTriggerEnum.PoolExhausted
member.summary: All captains are busy (no idle captains available).

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.LandingModeEnum
member.summary: Determines how completed mission work is landed (integrated).

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.LandingModeEnum.LocalMerge
member.summary: Merge the mission branch directly into the user's local working directory. Requires the vessel to have a WorkingDirectory and LocalPath configured.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.LandingModeEnum.PullRequest
member.summary: Push the mission branch and create a pull request on the remote. The mission stays in PullRequestOpen until the PR is merged.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.LandingModeEnum.MergeQueue
member.summary: Enqueue the mission branch for validated merge through the merge queue. The merge queue runs tests and merges sequentially per vessel.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.LandingModeEnum.None
member.summary: No automatic landing. Work stays as WorkProduced and the branch remains available in the bare repo for manual integration.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum
member.summary: Status of a merge queue entry.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum.Queued
member.summary: Queued for merge, waiting to be picked up.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum.Testing
member.summary: Currently being tested (merged into integration branch, tests running).

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum.Passed
member.summary: Tests passed, ready to land.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum.Failed
member.summary: Tests failed.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum.Landed
member.summary: Successfully merged into the target branch.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MergeStatusEnum.Cancelled
member.summary: Removed from the queue (manually or due to conflict).

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum
member.summary: Status of a mission.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Pending
member.summary: Mission created but not yet assigned.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Assigned
member.summary: Mission assigned to a captain.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.InProgress
member.summary: Captain is actively working on the mission.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.WorkProduced
member.summary: Agent exited successfully and work exists on the mission branch, but landing (merge, PR, or push) has not yet been attempted or completed.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.PullRequestOpen
member.summary: A pull request has been created for this mission's work, but the PR has not yet been merged. The mission is considered active until the PR is confirmed merged, at which point it transitions to Complete.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Testing
member.summary: Mission work complete, under testing.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Review
member.summary: Mission awaiting human review.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Complete
member.summary: Mission successfully completed.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Failed
member.summary: Mission failed.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.LandingFailed
member.summary: Landing was attempted but failed (merge conflict, push failure, PR creation failure, etc.).

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum.Cancelled
member.summary: Mission cancelled.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum
member.summary: Current connection state for the outbound remote-control tunnel.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum.Disabled
member.summary: Remote control is disabled in settings.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum.Disconnected
member.summary: The tunnel is not currently connected.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum.Connecting
member.summary: The tunnel is attempting to connect.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum.Connected
member.summary: The tunnel is connected to the proxy.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum.Error
member.summary: The tunnel encountered an error and will retry.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.RemoteTunnelStateEnum.Stopping
member.summary: The tunnel is shutting down.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum
member.summary: Type of signal between agents.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Assignment
member.summary: Mission assignment notification.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Progress
member.summary: Progress update from a captain.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Completion
member.summary: Mission completion notification.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Error
member.summary: Error notification.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Heartbeat
member.summary: Heartbeat signal.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Nudge
member.summary: Ephemeral nudge message.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.SignalTypeEnum.Mail
member.summary: Persistent mail message.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Enums.VoyageStatusEnum
member.summary: Status of a voyage.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.VoyageStatusEnum.Open
member.summary: Voyage created, missions being set up.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.VoyageStatusEnum.InProgress
member.summary: Voyage has active missions in progress.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.VoyageStatusEnum.Complete
member.summary: All missions in the voyage are complete.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.VoyageStatusEnum.Failed
member.summary: Voyage reached a terminal state with one or more failed missions.

member.name: F:Armada.Core.Enums.VoyageStatusEnum.Cancelled
member.summary: Voyage was cancelled.

member.summary: Style guide describing naming conventions, patterns, language restrictions, and library preferences.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Models.Vessel.EnableModelContext
member.summary: Whether model context accumulation is enabled for this vessel. When true, captains are instructed to update the model context with key information discovered during missions.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Models.Vessel.ModelContext
member.summary: Agent-accumulated context about this repository. Contains key information discovered by AI agents during missions, such as architectural insights, testing patterns, build quirks, and other knowledge useful for future missions. Updated by agents via armada_update_vessel_context when EnableModelContext is true.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Models.Vessel.LandingMode
member.summary: Landing mode for this vessel. Determines how completed mission work is integrated. Null means use the voyage or global setting. When set, this takes precedence over the legacy boolean flags (AutoPush, AutoCreatePullRequests, AutoMergePullRequests).

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Models.Vessel.BranchCleanupPolicy
member.summary: Branch cleanup policy for this vessel. Determines when and how mission branches are deleted after successful landing. Null means use the global setting (default: LocalOnly).

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Models.Vessel.AllowConcurrentMissions
member.summary: Whether this vessel allows multiple concurrent missions. Default false. When false, only one mission may be in an active state (Assigned, InProgress, WorkProduced, PullRequestOpen) at a time.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Models.Vessel.DefaultPipelineId
member.summary: Default pipeline to use for dispatches to this vessel. Vessel setting overrides fleet setting. Null uses WorkerOnly pipeline.

member.summary: Top-level orchestration service for coordinating missions and captains. Delegates domain logic to CaptainService, MissionService, VoyageService, and DockService.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.OnGetRemoteTunnelStatus
member.summary: Optional callback for retrieving outbound remote-tunnel status. This is kept as a concrete AdmiralService hook so server-only infrastructure can surface tunnel state without expanding the public orchestration interface yet.
Instantiate.

member.summary: Resolve which pipeline to use for a dispatch. Resolution order: explicit pipelineId > vessel default > fleet default > null (WorkerOnly).

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.HealthCheckCaptainAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Captain,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process health check for a single captain. Isolated so exceptions in one captain do not prevent processing of other captains.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.EmitEventAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Emit an event to the event log database.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.ReclaimOrphanedDocksAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reclaim docks that have been active for too long without an associated working captain. This catches docks leaked by failed launches or agent crashes.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.ReconcilePullRequestMissionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reconcile missions in PullRequestOpen status by checking if their PRs have been merged. This replaces the fire-and-forget 5-minute poller with a persistent, restart-safe check. Rate-limited to at most 10 missions per health check cycle.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.RecoverOrphanedMissionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Detect and recover orphaned missions — missions stuck in InProgress, Assigned, Review, or Testing whose captain has moved on to a different mission. This handles the edge case where a captain was reassigned before the health check could detect the old process exit.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.AdmiralService.ReclaimDockAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Captain,Armada.Core.Models.Mission,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reclaim the dock associated with a captain and/or mission. Clears CurrentDockId on the captain and DockId on the mission after reclaim. Handles gracefully if the dock or worktree is already gone.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.DockService.SeedEmptyRepoAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Vessel,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Forcefully remove a directory with retry logic to handle locked files. On Windows, file handles from recently-exited processes can linger and cause Directory.Delete to fail. This method retries with increasing delays to give the OS time to release handles.
Seed an empty bare repo with an initial commit containing a README.md. Uses a temporary clone to create the commit, then pushes to both the bare repo and the remote.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService
member.summary: Top-level orchestration service for coordinating missions and captains.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnLaunchAgent
member.summary: Delegate invoked when a captain needs an agent process started. The handler receives (captain, mission, dock) and should return the process ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnStopAgent
member.summary: Delegate invoked when a captain's agent process should be stopped.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnCaptureDiff
member.summary: Delegate invoked synchronously at completion to capture the diff before the worktree can be reclaimed.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnMissionComplete
member.summary: Delegate invoked when a mission completes and branch should be pushed/PR created. The handler receives (mission, dock).

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnVoyageComplete
member.summary: Delegate invoked when a voyage completes (all missions done). The handler receives the completed voyage.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnReconcilePullRequest
member.summary: Delegate invoked during health check to reconcile PullRequestOpen missions. The handler receives a mission and should check if its PR has been merged, returning true if the mission was reconciled (transitioned to Complete or LandingFailed).

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService.OnIsProcessExitHandled
member.summary: Delegate that checks whether a process exit has already been received and is being handled by the async exit callback. The health check uses this to avoid triggering recovery for a process whose exit handler is still in progress.

member.summary: Dispatch a voyage with one or more missions. Creates the voyage, creates missions, and auto-assigns available captains.

member.summary: Dispatch a new voyage with pipeline support. When a pipelineId is provided, each mission is wrapped in the pipeline's persona stages.
member.param: Optional pipeline ID. Resolved: explicit > vessel default > fleet default > WorkerOnly.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Services.MergeQueueService
member.summary: Merge queue that processes vessel+target-branch groups in parallel, while entries within each group are processed sequentially one at a time. Each successful merge is landed immediately so the next entry in the same group merges against the up-to-date target branch, eliminating the cascade failures that occur with batch-style processing.

member.summary: Process a group of entries that share the same vessel and target branch. Entries are processed one at a time in priority/creation order. Each successful merge is landed immediately so the next entry merges against the updated target.

member.summary: After a mission produces work, check if any missions in the same voyage depend on it and prepare them for assignment (inject prior stage context into description).

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.MissionService.ParseArchitectOutput(Armada.Core.Models.Mission)
member.summary: Parse structured mission definitions from an architect's output. Looks for [ARMADA:MISSION] markers in the mission diff snapshot or description.

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.MissionService.ProjectArchitectMissionsToLogAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Mission,System.Collections.Generic.List{Armada.Core.Services.MissionService.ParsedArchitectMission},System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.name: M:Armada.Core.Services.MissionService.IsPipelineHandoffPrepared(Armada.Core.Models.Mission,Armada.Core.Models.Mission)
member.summary: Determine whether a dependent pipeline mission has had upstream handoff context applied. The handoff path stamps the downstream mission with the dependency's branch name, so branch equality is used as the minimum readiness signal before launch.

member.name: T:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings
member.summary: Top-level application settings.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.DataDirectory
member.summary: Root data directory for Armada.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.DatabasePath
member.summary: Database file path.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.LogDirectory
member.summary: Log directory path.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.DocksDirectory
member.summary: Directory for git worktree docks.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.ReposDirectory
member.summary: Directory for bare repository clones.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.AdmiralPort
member.summary: Admiral REST API port.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.McpPort
member.summary: MCP server port.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.WebSocketPort
member.summary: WebSocket server port for real-time event streaming.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.HeartbeatIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Heartbeat check interval in seconds. Must be >= 5.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.StallThresholdMinutes
member.summary: Stall detection threshold in minutes. Must be >= 1.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MaxLandingRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of automatic landing retries when landing fails due to target-branch drift. Set to 0 to disable auto-retry. Must be in range [0, 10].

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.LandingMode
member.summary: Global landing mode for completed missions. Determines how work is integrated. When set, takes precedence over the legacy boolean flags (AutoPush, AutoCreatePullRequests, AutoMergePullRequests). Can be overridden per-vessel or per-voyage. Resolution order: voyage.LandingMode > vessel.LandingMode > settings.LandingMode > derive from booleans.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.BranchCleanupPolicy
member.summary: Global branch cleanup policy after successful landing. Can be overridden per-vessel. Default: LocalOnly.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.AutoPush
member.summary: Whether to automatically push changes to the remote on mission completion. Legacy setting — prefer LandingMode when possible.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.AutoCreatePullRequests
member.summary: Whether to automatically create pull requests on mission completion. Legacy setting — prefer LandingMode when possible. Requires AutoPush to be effective.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.AutoMergePullRequests
member.summary: Whether to automatically merge pull requests after creation. Legacy setting — prefer LandingMode when possible. Requires AutoCreatePullRequests to be effective.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MaxRecoveryAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of auto-recovery attempts for stalled captains. Must be >= 0.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MaxLogFileSizeBytes
member.summary: Maximum log file size in bytes before rotation. Must be >= 1024.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MaxLogFileCount
member.summary: Maximum number of rotated log files to keep per captain. Must be >= 1.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.SyslogServers
member.summary: Syslog targets for process-level logging. Defaults to a local syslog listener on 127.0.0.1:514.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.DataRetentionDays
member.summary: Data retention period in days for completed voyages, missions, signals, and events. Records older than this are purged by the background expiry task. Set to 0 to disable automatic expiry. Must be >= 0.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MinIdleCaptains
member.summary: Minimum number of idle captains to maintain. When idle count drops below this, new captains are spawned automatically. Set to 0 to disable auto-scaling. Must be >= 0.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MaxCaptains
member.summary: Maximum total captains allowed. Set to 0 for unlimited. Must be >= 0.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.MergeQueueTestCommand
member.summary: Default test command for merge queue verification. Individual merge entries can override this.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.ApiKey
member.summary: Optional API key for Admiral REST API authentication. Deprecated: retained for backward compatibility, maps to synthetic admin identity.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.DashboardPath
member.summary: Path to the external web dashboard directory (React build output). When set, the server serves static files from this directory at /dashboard. When null/empty, falls back to embedded wwwroot resources (legacy dashboard).

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.AllowSelfRegistration
member.summary: Whether self-registration via POST /api/v1/onboarding is enabled.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.RequireAuthForShutdown
member.summary: Whether POST /api/v1/server/stop requires authentication. When false (default), the shutdown endpoint is accessible without credentials, suitable for local development. When true, requires an authenticated identity, suitable for centralized or Docker deployments.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.SessionTokenEncryptionKey
member.summary: AES-256 encryption key for session tokens. Auto-generated if not provided.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.DefaultRuntime
member.summary: Default agent runtime to use when auto-creating captains. Null means auto-detect from PATH.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.Notifications
member.summary: Enable desktop notifications on mission completion/failure.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.TerminalBell
member.summary: Ring terminal bell on mission completion/failure during watch.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.IdleCaptainTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Idle captain timeout in seconds before auto-removal. 0 = disabled (captains persist indefinitely).

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings.Agents
member.summary: Per-runtime agent configuration.

member.summary: Escalation rules for automated notifications.

member.name: P:Armada.Core.Settings.MessageTemplateSettings.MergeCommitTemplate
member.summary: Template for local merge commit messages. Supported placeholders: {MissionId}, {MissionTitle}, {VoyageId}, {VoyageTitle}, {CaptainId}, {CaptainName}, {VesselId}, {VesselName}, {FleetId}, {DockId}, {BranchName}, {Timestamp}.
